Package org.eventb.core.ast.tests.datatype

Class TestSetInstantiation

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.AbstractTests
org.eventb.core.ast.tests.datatype.TestSetInstantiation
public class TestSetInstantiation extends AbstractTests
Unit tests of interface ISetInstantiation.
